operation: set Formula on one cell of a legacy FormulaArray
display_alerts_true: Excel displayed its partial-array rejection dialog
com_result: Excel may surface the rejection as an alert without a failed invocation

result: VT_ERROR-style Excel result rather than calculation enum
wrapper_policy: reject as a conversion error; query after Workbooks.Add
reference: Microsoft raw C++ sample creates a workbook before workbook-scoped use
